subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath revealed the Books and sent forth the Messengers for the protection of His servants and their attainment unto a station wherein they acknowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الکتب و ارسل الرسل لحفظ عباده و بلوغهم الی مقام یعترفون
